userMessage: Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 data CH2

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Setup I2C Decode on B1","description":"Configure Bus B1 for I2C decode with clock on CH1 and data on CH2 for MSO4/5/6 Series scopes.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Setup I2C Decode","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Requires the serial bus decode option SREMBD."}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Configure Bus B1","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:TYPe I2C;BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce CH1;BUS:B1:I2C:DATa:SOUrce CH2"}},{"id":"s5","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}}]},{"id":"g6","type":"group","label":"Verify I2C Decode","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s7","type":"query","label":"Read Bus B1 Type","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:TYPe?","saveAs":"bus_b1_type"}},{"id":"s8","type":"query","label":"Read B1 I2C Clock Source","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce?","saveAs":"bus_b1_i2c_clock_source"}},{"id":"s9","type":"query","label":"Read B1 I2C Data Source","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:I2C:DATa:SOUrce?","saveAs":"bus_b1_i2c_data_source"}}]},{"id":"s10","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
